full_description: To-Do List is a task-management app designed to help you stay organized and focused. Create and manage your to-do lists, set reminders, and track progress. The app provides customizable lists, allowing you to prioritize tasks and add deadlines. It also integrates with popular calendar apps, ensuring a seamless experience. With To-Do List, you can easily manage your daily, weekly, or monthly tasks, and receive reminders to stay on track. Key features include: customizable lists, reminders, progress tracking, and integration with calendar apps. Download To-Do List today and start managing your tasks more efficiently.
